item.title: AaronBower: Mark Wilson reposteó ᴀᴀʀᴏɴ ʙᴏᴡᴇʀ @AaronBower · 19h Exclusive: Sat down with NRL CEO Andrew Abdo last night: who admits t
item.description: Mark Wilson reposteó ᴀᴀʀᴏɴ ʙᴏᴡᴇʀ @AaronBower · 19h Exclusive: Sat down with NRL CEO Andrew Abdo last night: who admits there are 'pros and cons' to Super League moving back to winter. Abdo also insists any NRL vision will have London in Super League and clubs must relinquish power for a deal to happen. De theguardian.com 52 39 109 113 mil

item.title: Livesnooker: Live Snooker @Livesnooker · 6min Stepping out as the reigning champ De WST 142
item.description: Live Snooker @Livesnooker · 6min Stepping out as the reigning champ De WST 142

item.title:
Livesnooker: Live Snooker @Livesnooker · 6min Zhao Xintong - Liam Highfield
The World champ needs a couple of bites, but eventually
item.description:
Live Snooker @Livesnooker · 6min Zhao Xintong - Liam Highfield
The World champ needs a couple of bites, but eventually gets the opening frame on the board.
Watch live! https:// bit.ly/WSC26Stream 1 141
